summary: Password Recovery feature testing completed. Fixed critical datetime comparison bug in backend. All 19 backend tests PASSED. Frontend pages verified with proper 3-step flows for both User and Admin recovery.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes in forgot-pin/verify-otp and forgot-pin/reset endpoints
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added timezone-aware safe comparison for expires_at datetime from MongoDB

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Same datetime comparison bug in forgot-password/verify-otp and forgot-password/reset endpoints
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added timezone-aware safe comparison for expires_at datetime from MongoDB

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Error 'Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' when API returns 404
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added graceful error handling for JSON parse errors, shows user-friendly message

User Password Recovery - Initiate (POST.details: Returns 404 for non-existent phone, 400 for empty phone

Admin PIN Recovery - Initiate (POST /api.details: Returns 200 with recovery_token for valid admin email, 404 for non-admin

Admin PIN Recovery - Verify OTP (POST /a.details: Accepts master_password as OTP, returns 400 for wrong OTP

Admin PIN Recovery - Reset (POST /api/ad.details: Resets PIN successfully after OTP verification

Admin Full Recovery Flow.details: Complete 3-step flow: initiate -> verify (master password) -> reset PIN

User Forgot Password Page (/forgot-passw.details: 3-step UI renders correctly, error handling works

Admin Forgot Password Page (/admin/forgo.details: 3-step UI renders correctly, step transitions work

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend datetime comparison bug fixed - MongoDB stores naive datetimes, code now handles both
✓ Frontend error handling improved - graceful fallback for JSON parse errors
✓ Added data-testid attributes to User Forgot Password page for better testability
✓ Admin Forgot Password page already had proper data-testid attributes
✓ Master password 'addrika_admin_override' works as OTP for admin recovery (as designed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Password Recovery feature fully tested and working. User recovery uses phone number to send OTP to registered email. Admin recovery uses email to send OTP. Master password 'addrika_admin_override' can be used as OTP for admin recovery. Fixed datetime comparison bug in both auth.py and admin_auth.py - MongoDB stores naive datetimes but code was comparing with timezone-aware datetime.now(timezone.utc).
